comments.author: @johnleca
comments.text: BEWARE!!!!!!!!!1 I currently bought a small 1/2 acre lot it was perfect EXCEPT West Virginia has no actual functioning proper Police or Government of really any kind. After buying the lot I was confronted by two very hostile women during my first trip there. I tried to calm these hostile women and offered them documents photos my identification and suggested that the Police be called to make a report. The WV State Police showed up and were proved everything in terms of documents and I had photographs and the deed etc. The Trooper examined everything and had to drive to the top of the mountain to use his phone and had taken the females identification info as well and she left. He returned and unbelievably the real estate agent who handled my purchase Monica Harper, her husband was an active WV State trooper as well and had actually taken the photos of the property for his wife. So???Lucky huh? Well no report was generated and the Trooper came back and told me everything was proper I was NOT trespassing and was the proper owner. All good huh? Well I have no idea IF he notified the insane women and warned them to NOT harass or violate any criminal laws and certainly they can file a civil suit If they chose. fair enough? So 2 weeks after this the same women block the easement and confront a landscaper i have contracted by putting a locked steel cable across the right of way. Now neither of these women state they actually own anything but are acting on "behalf of family" members who they are not on good terms with and have refused to give any land to them! Yes ;lots of inbreeding I guess and literally insane. I have contacted the WV State Police for a report they never prepared, have no report number BUT a Sergeant said he sees the call for service, Contacted the sheriff, the braxton county prosecutor, the attorney's who handled the closing, the tax assessor, the realtor Monica who states she could not even relist the property because she is aware of the criminal actions and refused to do so, SO their is really a lot of problems IF you would encounter any insane people who just show up and take the law into their own hands and get this I was sent a pdf of my deed but I was promised the certified hard copy via mail. Never arrived and yes followed up on that. It just seems that West Virginia just does ZERO to ensure anything is properly done. There is a thing called the WV property viewer which is run by government and is supposed to be updated yearly It has not been updated in over three years! I will be paying to file action with an attorney but really just beware NOTHING IS RUNNING PROPERLY OR REASONABLY AND IF YOU ENCOUNTER INBREEDING INSANE REDNECK FEMALES expect lots of expense and failures.. I am hope full in some ways because I did find some really wonderful people there a woman named Pam and Beverly who did give me some great information. I look forward to seeing them again and maybe at the Hebron Church and meet their family as well but honestly this is my experience so beware.
